summary: T2 high-value NEW-GM intent migration baseline is archive-ready. All four shards contain execution, review, and compliance records. The track correctly distinguishes already_present, partially_present, and selective migration labels without pretending unresolved gaps are closed.
remaining_risks: Lifecycle and audit contracts still use non-canonical intent_id values relative to dispatch naming.
Several migration contracts remain under docs/ migration paths instead of production contracts/ assets.
outer_intent_ingest and outer_contract_freeze are selected for migrate now but remain planned, not mainline.
time_semantics still needs a current replay regression artifact tied to archive flow.
